request_text: Search the upstream Priivacy-ai/spec-kitty issue tracker for open issues that touch the same or related surface as issue #2437 (env-var indirection for doctrine/charter pack paths in .kittify/config.yaml). Identify candidates we can fold into our Regnology branch issue/2437-env-var-pack-paths scope. Report issue numbers, titles, overlap rationale, and fold-in recommendation.

evidence_ref: Upstream issue scan for #2437 related surface; fold-in recommendations delivered to operator
